refiner_statement.description: Our own position/exchange report for the contract (text or JSON) — generated from the trade/ETRM system.
refiner_statement.title: Refiner Statement

counterparty_statement.description: The counterparty's exchange statement for the same contract period.
counterparty_statement.title: Counterparty Statement

variance.description: The quantified variance between the two statements, with units and currency, e.g. '-1,420.5 bbl (-$98,236)'.
variance.title: Variance

variance_category.description: The single best-fit category for the root cause. One of: temperature-basis, volume-rounding, grade-differential, delivery-point, timing-cutoff, demurrage, pricing-formula, missing-line-item, duplicate-line-item, fx-conversion, other.
variance_category.title: Variance Category

confidence.description: Confidence from 0.0 to 1.0 that the explanation and proposed correction are right. Lower it when the statements are ambiguous.
confidence.title: Confidence

explanation.description: Plain-English explanation of WHY the two statements disagree.
explanation.title: Explanation

proposed_correction.description: The adjustment that would reconcile the statements, written as a recommendation for a human to approve before any posting — never a posting itself.
proposed_correction.title: Proposed Correction
